flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Christopher Newport University rose 13% between 2021 and 2024 ($14.9k → $16.8k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Christopher Newport University rose 12% between 2021 and 2024 ($27.8k → $31.2k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Christopher Newport University fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (0.6% → 0.0%).
